feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).
entry.content:
Dear Expert ,

How to Solve this error i am unable to post my GRPO Document due to 

MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).*

*Transaction MMPV (period closing program) cannot be executed. For more information, see Note 1082841*

entry.title: Is it safe to use ENQUEUE_ESINDX in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are migrating to S/4HANA and our ATC lists all usage of ENQUEUE_ESINDX (Used to make sure sure program/table is only used by one person at a time) as priority 1 "error". In the attached SAP Note there's no mention of this FM specifically, it's a general note for SAP S/4HANA custom code adaption - removal of orphaned objects. 

I've tested the programs and this functionality specifically and it's still working just fine. Should I be worried this would be suddenly removed in a minor update in the future?

If I need to address this, what should I use instead of ENQUEUE_ESINDX and DEQUEUE_ESINDX?

Thanks,
Birgir Snorrason

entry.title: Changing career from B1 specialist to S/4HANA
entry.content: I have 15 years of experience in SAP business one as power user as I was a VP of a medium organization but I find the opportunities limited in terms of size of organizations and salary in comparison to SAP s/4HANA. Looking for suggestions such as I have some experience with course work in SAP Supply chain management in ECC, but I spent the majority of my time in Business one in the finance side of the things with a focus on marketing documents we would call it  (A/R and A/P invoices). I did various system upgrade in business one along with process and query optimizations.

entry.title: S/4HANA Readiness check does not provide quickfix in eclipse result browser
entry.content:
Hey there!

 

The main poblems seems to be that the function "Analyze Result in ATC Problems View" (right click on check run in ATC result browser, described in Semi-automatic custom code adaptation after SAP S/... - SAP Community) does not work properly. 

If we click this function, we only get:

We can click on a check run result, right-click on recheck and then the check will be displayed in the ATC problems view. But only for the selected entry. 

I expect that "Analyze Result in ATC Problems View" works properly.

What are we missing/ doing wrong so that the quickfixes are not available at first?

Thanks in advance
 ~Enno

entry.title: How to do the Synchronous B2BCustomer replication from SAP Commerce to S/4 Hana
entry.content:
We have came across a requirement to Integrate the Outbound B2BCustomer data from SAP Commerce to S/4 Hana public cloud using sync call.

As we have Asynchronous call in OOTB where we can send the data to CPI and we will not read the response data from CPI, how we can integrate the Outbound B2BCustomer data Synchronously .

Thank you

entry.title: Learn about enterprise structure
entry.content: Learn about enterprise structure and best practices when implementing a new company. or updating an existing one.

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2210 - Goods Issue - UOM Issue
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are in the process of enabling the Inventory Clerk persona in the SSAM 2210 application. As part of that, we are facing an issue when we post the Goods Receipt/Good Issue against PO/Reservation from the mobile application.

'Unit ST is not created in language EN' - If post from device where we have language set as Danish.

'Unit PC is not created in language DA'- If post from device where we have language set as English

Can you please help us on this?

entry.title: SAP Forms Service by Adobe with WebUI S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing the Grantor Management solution from SAP on the S/4 system. This solution foresees in several user interfaces for the end-user:

  • Web User Interface (based on FIORI 3.0)
  • Fiori apps

The Fiori apps for Grantor are not official native Fiori apps but are more WCF kind of apps (WEBCUIF).

During the process of handling the Grantor transactions is creating output (correspondence) that is send to the customer. So for this, the user should be able to generate a document (brief/letter) that is retrieving data from the S/4 back end and pre-fill the document.

Once the document is created by the system, the user should be able to edit this document before sending it to the customer.For this process of creating and editing documents we would like to propose SAP Forms by Adobe since we were told this is the future-proof solution provided by SAP for this purpose.

The Grantor solution is not new, it was already released years ago on SAP CRM system. This SAP CRM system user interface was called the CRM WebClient.
In the past we had several discussions with SAP regarding the possibility to use SAP Forms by Adobe with the SAP CRM WebClient. It was then determined that this would not work due to old techniques in SAP CRM and it would only work with S/4HANA.

Now since Grantor is now running on S/4HANA we would like to know if it is now possible to use SAP Forms by Adobe with the Web User interface (based on FIORI 3.0) and/or the Fiori apps (WCF type of Fiori apps)?

Why we would like to position SAP Forms by Adobe in combination with Grantor is because of the capabilities of the SAP Forms solution:

  • Create interactive forms that look exactly like their paper counterparts.
  • Annotate PDF documents and collaborate on PDF document reviews.
  • Capture data using forms and import the data directly into the SAP system.
  • Allow users to digitally sign PDF documents.
  • Embed other file formats inside PDF documents as attachments.

So the question we have is, is it possible to use SAP Forms by Adobe in combination with the Web User Interface and/or Fiori apps for Grantor on S/4HANA?

Best regards,

Pieter Schepers

entry.title: could I mix plants and storage locations?
entry.content: Could I mix plants and storage locations?

entry.title: Business partner types/roles
entry.content: Where would I go to know what each business partner roles does?

entry.title: Business partner types/roles
entry.content: For the material master does the material type have certain limitations where it can be used in SAP? Procurement vs. Sales? Also could we create a type?

entry.title: C_HANATEC_19 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07
entry.content:
Hello ,

I've noticed today that the "C_HANATEC_19 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07" certification exam is retiring soon ( 28/03/2024). Please could you explain what does this mean. Also , do we have to wait until 2025 to take the new exam that will replace that one? Is the Learning Content on the Learning Journey still updated to cover this subject ?

Thank you in advance for your help.

Have a great day

entry.title: Flexible Workflow and Release Strategy together
entry.content:
Can we use below two together in Purchase requisition:

  1. Release strategy of Purchase requisition at item level
  2. Flexible workflow

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP certification
entry.content:
Hello all consultant, i'm currently a S/4 MM and EWM certified associate. My question is, which certification should i take next that best suit my career or for future demand? 

Appreciate your advice. Thank you

entry.title: Key differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Can anyone tell the differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud. How feasible it is to move current MDG system on S/4 Hana on-premise to S/4 Hana Cloud. Do S/4 Hana cloud supports all objects in MDG like Financials, Business partners, Material etc...

Any SAP blogs/ Support portal links would help.

entry.title: Usage of Function: currency_conversion in Analytical query CDS view
entry.content:
Hello,

How to use Function: currency_conversion in Analytical query CDS view? Any standard CDS views exists in S/4 HANA?

Regards

Siva

entry.title: Custom fields in BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD
entry.content:
Business has implemented the Badi BADI_MAT_CUST_SCR for extension of components in CJ20N.  This works fine, but there is a customer-specific process for creating Networks, activities and assign components.  In this process, BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD is used to assign components.

How to include the custom fields via BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD ?

These fields are saving in RSADD table.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: configuration document & SAP notes
entry.content:
Need guidance on std configuration documents for particular topics and relevant guidance on SAP Note.

i have s-user id plz give me guidance

entry.title: Originals can not be selected in tco. CV03n
entry.content:
Hello

After the conversion to S/4HANA we are facing an issue in tco. CV03n, when working on a small screen or in a small window. Due to the fact that the subcreens for Document Data und Superior Document are nor resizable, it happens that the Originals are no longer displayed. Even the scrollbar for the Originals section is hidden. Please see the attached print screen.

Is there a chance to fix that so the users can find and display all relevant documents?

Regards, Markus

entry.title: Why are standard CDS Views not showing in Custom CDS View app to use as a reference?
entry.content:
I am attempting to follow the guide: Setup Guide
General Ledger Master Record Creation Process using SAP Workflow Management or SAP Build Process Automation.

The Guide has these instructions for creating the necessary Custom CDS Views:

Steps for Creating Custom CDS:
1. Click on Custom CDS app in Fiori Launchpad.
2. Select standard CDS view name like -ICompanycode and click on Create button
3. Enter the custom CDS view name like -ZZ1_COMPANYCODE and Select the specific fields
from standard CDS view and click on Save
4. After SAVE click on publish button to create API-ZZ1_COMPANYCODE_CDS which is used
to register OData service.
5. Repeat same steps for other CDS views.

 

However, the new Custom CDS View app does not bring in the standard CDS Views to select in step 2. I have seen other Community Q&A indicating that the new Custom CDS View App does not show the Standard CDS Views like the deprecated version had done.   How do I create the Custom CDS Views with reference to standard?
